title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE ALFONSO CASTAГғВ‘EDA HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ” PELAWAY ANNEX IN BARANGAY PELAWAY, MUNICIPALITY OF ALFONSO CASTAГғВ‘EDA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA FROM THE ALFONSO CASTAГғВ‘EDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CASECNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5270; 106 OG No. 7, 900 (February 15, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9823, November 26, 2009 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE ALFONSO CASTAГғВ‘EDA HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ” PELAWAY ANNEX IN BARANGAY PELAWAY, MUNICIPALITY OF ALFONSO CASTAГғВ‘EDA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA FROM THE ALFONSO CASTAГғВ‘EDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CASECNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

ГўВҖВ” The Alfonso CastaГұeda National High School ГўВҖВ” Pelaway Annex in Barangay Pelaway, Municipality of Alfonso CastaГұeda, Province of Nueva Vizcaya is hereby separated from the Alfonso CastaГұeda High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Casecnan National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВҖВ” All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Alfonso CastaГұeda National High School ГўВҖВ” Pelaway Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Casecnan National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Casecnan National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Alfonso CastaГұeda National High School ГўВҖВ” Pelaway Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВҖВ” The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВҖВ” This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 17, 2008 and August 17, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 26 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
